creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Based on http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsLongtermTargets it would seem that having a SHA256 hash is preferable.

This is a simple make fetch; make makesum for www/dfileserver

--- olddistinfo	2009-12-11 12:11:07.000000000 +0200
+++ distinfo	2009-12-11 12:11:09.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (DFileServer-1.1.3.tar.gz) =3D 439970464d42a2639e31076ffa4d3c14
-SIZE (DFileServer-1.1.3.tar.gz) =3D 22909
+MD5 (DFileServer-1.1.3.tar.gz) = 439970464d42a2639e31076ffa4d3c14
+SHA256 (DFileServer-1.1.3.tar.gz) = 450beaa1aea3151d8d4da14c9f60c1fc5cef69fc79bcf3e29d8e983b8e4eb1d5
+SIZE (DFileServer-1.1.3.tar.gz) = 22909
